# Ricardo M'Boukou — Web Developer · Digital Communication

> Fullstack web developer with a genuine interest in digital marketing.
> Available for a digital marketing internship (alternance webmarketing).
> Bilingual FR / EN. Based in France.

## Positioning

Ricardo M'Boukou is a fullstack web developer who sits at the intersection
of technical development and digital marketing. He understands both the
technical architecture side and the content and campaign side.

His background is unconventional: eleven years in operational management
before retraining in web development and digital communication. He uses AI
daily as a practical tool — not as a trend.

## Stack & Skills

- Next.js · React · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS
- Node.js · PostgreSQL · Docker
- Technical SEO (Schema.org, dynamic meta, hreflang, sitemap)
- AI tools: Claude API, Gemini API, OpenAI, NotebookLM
- Content creation, SEO copywriting, A/B variant generation
- FastAPI · Python

## AI Workflow (daily)

- Development: component generation, debugging, code review (Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT)
- Learning: topic-based flashcard generation via QuizFlip + Gemini API
- Content creation: SEO reformulation, A/B headline variants (Claude, ChatGPT, Canva AI)
- Automation: personal assistant via OpenClaw + Telegram with multi-model fallback

## Projects

### Kiff Cleaning Solutions
Next.js showcase site for an extreme cleaning company in Île-de-France.
Local SEO with city-level GEO targeting, UX built for two distinct
audiences (families in crisis + professional partners). Schema.org,
dynamic meta tags, 18 dedicated city pages.
Stack: Next.js · TypeScript · Tailwind · Vercel

### WorldRemit Tax Tracker
Fullstack application consolidating 3 years of international transfers
that WorldRemit could not summarise. From a Python script to a complete
FastAPI + MongoDB + Next.js app with deduplication and PDF export for
tax authorities.
Stack: Python · FastAPI · MongoDB · Next.js · TypeScript · Docker

### QuizFlip
Personal AI-powered flashcard learning tool built on the Gemini API.
Fills a gap in NotebookLM: topic-based classification of generated cards.
Two creation modes — manual or one-click AI generation — with admin dashboard.
Stack: React · Node.js · PostgreSQL · Prisma · Gemini API

### Noce Florale RSVP
Fullstack RSVP application managing 300+ guests across 2 events.
Behind the simple guest-facing UI sits a real event CRM: group
segmentation, real-time analytics, dashboards for budget and catering.
Stack: Next.js · GraphQL · MongoDB · TypeScript

### OpenClaw Personal Assistant
Personal AI assistant running through Telegram with multi-model
orchestration: OpenAI as primary model, Gemini and Anthropic Claude as
automatic fallbacks. Hands-on exploration of resilient AI pipelines.
Architecture: Telegram · OpenAI GPT · Gemini · Anthropic Claude

### Enidpath (Consultancy Site)
Digital consultancy site designed and delivered end-to-end — from Next.js
architecture to Vercel production deployment.
Stack: Next.js · TypeScript · Tailwind · Vercel
